tasks.title: Implement src/engine/effort.ts

tasks.description: NEW: canonical role multiplier defaults — RE=6, TS=4, PM=2, PE=1.5, DE=5 — and config override resolution

tasks.title: Implement src/engine/report-writer.ts
tasks.description: NEW: generates effort markdown report to `docs/assessments/effort-<feature>-YYYY-MM-DD.md`
